name: u64_prefix_freedom_external_body
reason: `u64::lemma_serialization_is_not_a_prefix_of` is `external_body` despite being provable — all u64 serializations are 8 bytes so prefix-freedom reduces to injectivity of `spec_u64_to_le_bytes`

name: usize_serialize_injective_external_body
reason: `usize::lemma_serialize_injective` is `external_body` despite being provable from u64 injectivity — full equality of usize values rests on an unverified axiom

name: vec_u8_prefix_freedom_external_body
code:
proof fn phi_3_vec_u8_prefix_freedom_external_body(a: Vec<u8>, b: Vec<u8>)
    requires
        !a.view_equal(&b),
        a.is_marshalable(),
        b.is_marshalable(),
        a.ghost_serialize().len() <= b.ghost_serialize().len(),
    ensures
        a.ghost_serialize() != b.ghost_serialize().subrange(0, a.ghost_serialize().len() as int),
{
    a.lemma_serialization_is_not_a_prefix_of(&b);
}
reason: `Vec<u8>::lemma_serialization_is_not_a_prefix_of` is `external_body` — prefix-freedom for length-prefixed byte vectors is provable from usize serialization properties but left entirely trusted

name: vec_t_injectivity_depends_on_prefix_freedom

name: vec_u8_serialize_injective_external_body
reason: `Vec<u8>::lemma_serialize_injective` is `external_body` — injectivity of length-prefixed byte vector serialization is entirely trusted despite being provable from the length-prefix structure
